data.title: Hallmark Names Shachar Rabbe as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: The appointment of a new Chief Financial Officer by Hallmark in Dallas has been announced. The individual brings a demonstrated history of senior finance and operations leadership, contributing to significant growth within the company.

data.title: Video News Release: EdgeMode fast-tracks off-grid power supply for AI data centers
data.description: Initiating operations in Spain, a major renewable energy company has recently launched a 300 MW DC facility. This strategic move marks the company's entrance into the Americas market. The facility is expected to significantly contribute to the region's energy sector and enhance the company's global presence. With a capacity of 300 MW DC, the facility symbolizes the company's commitment to expanding its operations and advancing sustainable energy practices.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slammed 500 Points; Google Smacked To 200-Day Line (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market witnessed a significant decline, with the Dow Jones index plummeting by 500 points on Thursday. This drop was primarily attributed to the poor performance of Alphabet and Tesla stocks following their earnings reports. Alongside this decline, oil prices surged. Overall, it was a challenging day for investors as major indices were strongly impacted by these developments.

data.title: BlackRock, Coinbase & Strategy commit $15M to Quantum-Resistant Bitcoin development, backed by nine major institutional players.
data.description: A consortium of nine prominent institutional investors in Bitcoin has come together to provide funding for developers focused on enhancing the network's security. These investors are pooling their resources to support efforts to protect the network from potential threats posed by quantum computers in the future.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Evolution Well Services Announces Two-Year Partnership Extension with Large Independent Operator
data.description: EVOLUTION WELL SERVICES has extended its partnership with a major independent operator for two more years. The agreement involves Evolution providing high-efficiency frac services to the E&P partner. As a leader in electric hydraulic fracturing, Evolution looks forward to continuing its successful collaboration with the operator.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $6.6 bln.

data.title: Auben Realty Expands Atlanta Presence with Acquisition of Peach State Property Management
data.description: Auben, based in Augusta, Georgia, has recently completed the acquisition of Peach State Property Management, located in Metro Atlanta. This move marks a significant expansion of Auben's presence in Georgia and aims to improve services offered to real estate investors in the region. The acquisition is set to further strengthen Auben's market position and increase its portfolio in the area.

data.title: Florida-Based Science and Technology Company Crescel Announces Landmark Peer-Reviewed Medical Publication
data.description: A recent clinical study, indexed in PubMed, has revealed remarkable findings in the treatment of rosacea. The study compared the efficacy of a new treatment by Crescel LLC based in Miami Beach, Florida, against the current leading prescription standard of care. The results displayed superior outcomes of the new treatment, indicating the potential for better overall results in managing rosacea. These findings not only suggest improved patient outcomes but also the possibility of reducing healthcare costs associated with treating rosacea. This study could potentially revolutionize the approach to managing this skin condition, offering a more effective and affordable solution.

data.title: CPSC Posts New Product Recalls and Product Safety Warnings to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed a notification regarding product recalls and safety alerts that can be accessed at www.cpsc.gov. Specifically, EnHomee 9-Drawer Fabric Dressers are being recalled due to concerns over potential tip-over and entrapment risks. This recall was prompted by the threat of serious injury or death arising from these hazards. For further details, individuals are encouraged to visit the aforementioned website for more information.

data.title: Consumer Genius Co-Founder Jay Modi Named in Visionaries Network Top Business Leaders Awards 2026
data.description: After years devoted to constructing performance marketing platforms linking consumers with financial services, home services, and legal professionals in Canada, the United States, the United Kingdom, and Australia, an individual from Calgary, AB has received recognition for their efforts. The award was received on July 23, 2026, reflecting their successful career in this sector.

data.title: i3 Verticals Announces Earnings Release and Conference Call Date for Third Quarter of Fiscal 2026
data.description: i3 Verticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IIIV) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on June 30, 2026, on August 6, 2026, following the Nasdaq market closure. A conference call is scheduled for August 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to review the financial outcomes and operational matters. Those interested in listening live via telephone can dial (844) 887-9399 about 10 minutes before the call commences.

data.title: Vise and Alpha Architect Bring AI-Powered Custom Model Portfolios to RIAs of All Sizes
data.description: Vise has announced a partnership with Alpha Architect in New York to offer AI-driven, tax-efficient custom model portfolios to Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs) of all sizes. This collaboration will provide RIAs access to integrated platform solutions.
Fitch Ratings: Chinese money market funds continue to expand despite low yields.

data.title: CHICKEN SALAD CHICK CONTINUES NORTH CAROLINA GROWTH
data.description: A fast casual restaurant concept is set to hold its grand opening in Durham on August 4th, offering free chicken salad for a year to lucky customers. Chicken Salad Chick, which is the sole fast casual chicken salad eatery in the country, revealed the launch of a new branch in Durham.

data.title: MAG Capital Partners Completes ~$89 Million Sale of 1.37M-SF Midwest Industrial Portfolio to Fundamental Income Properties, a Subsidiary of Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD)
data.description: MAG Capital Partners revealed today that they have finalized the sale of over 1.37 million square feet of industrial assets. These properties were acquired mainly through their MAGCP Industrial Fund II, LP. In the transaction, six properties were sold for approximately $89 million.

data.title: PENSKE TEAMSTERS RATIFY SOUTHCENTRAL AND SOUTHEASTERN REGIONAL AGREEMENTS
data.description: In a recent development, approximately 250 Teamsters located in Florida, Georgia, and Missouri have successfully secured a favorable contract. The members of Teamsters Locals 79, 512, 528, 541, 618, and 769, working at Penske, have voted in favor of ratifying the Southcentral and Southeastern Regional Master Agreements. The newly approved contracts span over four years, outlining crucial terms and conditions for the aforementioned regions.
